words.name: Building
words.description:
A structure with a roof and walls.
How to sign:
1. Use the dominant '5' handshape, palm down, and move it up from the wrist.
2. Use both hands in 'B' handshapes and move them vertically, tracing the shape of a building.
words.howToSign: 1. Use the dominant '5' handshape, palm down, and move it up from the wrist. 2. Use both hands in 'B' handshapes and move them vertically, tracing the shape of a building.

words.name: Tree
words.description:
A woody perennial plant, typically having a single stem or trunk.
How to sign:
1. Rest the dominant elbow on the non-dominant arm (representing the trunk).
2. Hold the dominant hand in the '5' handshape.
3. Wiggle the fingers slightly (representing leaves/branches).
words.howToSign: 1. Rest the dominant elbow on the non-dominant arm (representing the trunk). 2. Hold the dominant hand in the '5' handshape. 3. Wiggle the fingers slightly (representing leaves/branches).
